MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS WESTPORT CONSTRUCTION GROUP, INC. AND MARK BOYLAN's Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Motion granted. The Court declines to consider plaintiff's late-filed opposition. (Cal. R. Ct. 3.1300(d).) Accordingly, the motion is granted as unopposed.

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)
